title: AI agents can manage your passwords. Should we let them? Plus: The biggest Patch Tuesday ever.
summary: An IBM Security Intelligence podcast episode discusses whether AI agents should manage password security, prompted by Apple's capability to detect compromised passwords and update them automatically. The episode also covers Microsoft's June 2026 Patch Tuesday with over 200 CVE fixes and debates whether C-suite executives are taking excessive cyber risk in pursuit of innovation.
writeup: This IBM Security Intelligence podcast episode weighs whether AI agents should take over password security, using Apple's ability to detect compromised passwords and update them automatically as the prompt for the debate. It also breaks down Microsoft's June 2026 Patch Tuesday, which carried over 200 CVE fixes, and examines whether C-suite executives are accepting excessive cyber risk in the name of innovation. The discussion centers on the tradeoffs of delegating identity management to agents and the security posture of organizations chasing fast deployment.
